rubric_items.reasoning: The agent fully achieved the task objective. The oracle for stage_03 (file-realm-user-roles-merge) passes, confirming that report-user can now authenticate. The agent correctly diagnosed that the precondition probe had skipped the apply block (7 pods already running from prior stages), leaving the ES 8.11.1 cluster with no file realm configured. The fix was sound: generated bcrypt credentials for both users, created an aggregate secret with merged users/users_roles files, reconfigured the es-config ConfigMap to declare file1 and native1 realms, patched the StatefulSet to mount the file-realm secret, created the missing native `read` role (correctly noting it is not a pre-built role in ES 8.x as it is in 7.x), and deleted the orphaned test-index to restore cluster health. The regression sweep stage_01 failure (5 pods found vs 3 expected) is a natural artifact of the workflow progression from stage_02's scale-up, not a regression introduced by this stage. Stages 02, 03, and 04 all pass. No operators or CRDs were installed, and the cluster was kept healthy.
